audit_scope.verdict_rule: confirmed = expected Python deliverable exists, imports, and has passing task-fit runtime evidence; partial = imports/existence are present but a referenced module is missing, behavior is incomplete, or test evidence is missing/misaligned; missing = claimed deliverable file absent or non-importable

critical_findings: CMMS Auto/Micro/Ship tiering exists in runtime/memory_store.py and CMMS pytest subset passes, but runtime/memory_encrypt.py from the roadmap references does not exist.
Task 22 lifecycle logic does not retire skills after 3 consecutive failures once a skill has already reached the promotion threshold; success_count check wins first.
Task 30 security envelope appears self-contained in runtime/autoresearch_engine.py and does not integrate hooks/firewall.py despite the roadmap claim.
Task 32 marks claude as a confirmed provider in provider_registry.py, but no runtime/providers/claude_provider.py exists.

task_verdicts.title: CMMS Tier Routing Architecture

pytest: python3 -m pytest tests/runtime/test_memory_schema.py -q -o addopts='' -> collection error (dataclass/importlib loader interaction)

task_verdicts.reason: Core CMMS routing works and targeted CMMS tests pass, but the roadmap-referenced runtime/memory_encrypt.py module is absent and isolated test_memory_schema collection failed.

task_verdicts.title: Advanced Handoff — Retry Optimization
task_verdicts.reason: The Python auto-resume module exists, imports cleanly, and its retry-budget/compaction test file passes.

smoke: auto_correct_template('Please think step by step', 'gemini', 0.6) -> 2 provider-specific corrections

task_verdicts.reason: Auto-correction overlay logic exists and smoke-runs, but the roadmap-named pytest coverage is absent.

task_verdicts.title: Self-Evolving Skills — Auto-Propose from Repeated Patterns
task_verdicts.reason: Auto-proposal primitives exist, import cleanly, and both pytest plus targeted smoke checks succeed.

task_verdicts.title: Self-Evolving Skills — Auto-Promote + Auto-Retire

smoke: SkillLifecycleManager promoted a skill to active after 5 successes
After 3 consecutive failures the same skill remained active in smoke testing instead of retiring

task_verdicts.reason: Promotion logic works, but retirement does not trigger after promotion because success_count >= threshold is checked before consecutive_failures.

task_verdicts.reason: The Python engine exists and produces reports, but the roadmap-named tests/runtime/test_autoresearch.py file is absent.

task_verdicts.reason: The eval module works in smoke testing, but the roadmap-named tests/runtime/test_eval_gate.py file is missing.

smoke: RegressionDetector.check_release_gate() returned passed=false with one regression when current metrics dropped below baseline

task_verdicts.reason: Release-gate regression logic exists and smoke-runs, but there is no matching tests/runtime/test_eval_gate.py coverage in the repo.

task_verdicts.reason: The Python governance-routing surface exists, imports, and its dedicated test file passes cleanly.

task_verdicts.title: /autoresearch Background Daemon Mode
task_verdicts.reason: Daemon helpers exist and smoke-run, but no matching Python pytest coverage exists for the roadmap claim.

task_verdicts.title: /autoresearch Security Envelope

No direct import or call-site reference to hooks/firewall.py was found inside runtime/autoresearch_engine.py

task_verdicts.reason: The security-envelope module has local budget/read-only checks, but this audit did not confirm the roadmap-claimed firewall.py integration and the named pytest file is missing.

task_verdicts.reason: Provider registry and several adapters exist, but claude is marked confirmed without a corresponding runtime/providers/claude_provider.py adapter.

task_verdicts.title: Provider Expansion — Parity Testing for New Providers
task_verdicts.reason: Both parity modules exist, import cleanly, and the dedicated provider-parity tests pass.
